summary: Pre-deployment E2E verification COMPLETE. Tested 6 tasks (1,2,3,4,5,7). All critical fixes verified working correctly on battwheels_dev database.

checks: All 7 fields present: Organization Name, Your Name, Email, Password, Confirm Password, City, State
POST /api/v1/amc/plans returns 403 with error='plan_upgrade_required' for free_trial user
GET /api/v1/tickets returns 200 for free_trial user (not gated)
grep for '—' (em dash) in frontend/src/pages/*.jsx returns no results
grep for '—' (em dash) in frontend/src/components/*.jsx returns no results
POST /api/v1/tickets with vehicle_category='2W' returns vehicle_category='2W' in response
Response structure includes all expected fields: total_revenue, total_expenses, gross_profit

seed_data_creation: Test users cleaned up from battwheels_dev after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 tasks tested and PASSED. DB switched back to production (battwheels). Demo org (demo@voltmotors.in / Demo@12345) has professional plan in dev DB but test was done with freshly created free_trial org. The plan_enforcement middleware correctly blocks AMC endpoint for free_trial users. Registration form correctly shows all 7 fields and submits to /api/v1/organizations/signup.
testing_methodology: Used curl commands for API testing, Playwright for UI testing, ran tests on battwheels_dev database then switched back to production
